title: OrchestrateOS Gershwin GPS - Beta Sandbox Architecture
purpose: Load this FIRST before any Gershwin work. This is the BETA containerized version with referral-based tool unlocking and terminal wizard integration.

golden_rules.1_execution: ALL tool calls go through ngrok API: POST /execute_task with tool_name, action, params
golden_rules.3_protected: Never directly edit: system_settings.ndjson, unlock_status.json, credentials.json
golden_rules.4_queue_files: Tasks go to claude_task_q1.json, q2.json, q3.json (NOT claude_task_queue.json - legacy)
golden_rules.5_unlock_required: Premium tools require unlock via referral credits before use

repository_context.name: orchestrate-gershwin
repository_context.purpose: OrchestrateOS Beta Sandbox - Testing environment for new features with containerized execution
repository_context.vs_jarvis: This is the BETA containerized version. orchestrate-jarvis is Srini's personal local repo

tool_locking_architecture.overview: Three-tier lock/unlock system with cloud sync via JSONBin

tier_1_registry.purpose: Central tool and action registry - the RUNTIME source of truth

tier_2_marketplace.purpose: Marketplace catalog - defines available tools, costs, and setup flows

tier_3_cloud_sync.purpose: Cloud source of truth for referral credits and unlocks across devices

local_cache.purpose: Fast local lookup of unlocked tools (no network)

free_tools.name: json_manager
free_tools.description: Save and manage tasks, notes, ideas

free_tools.name: system_settings
free_tools.description: Manage core config - tools, memory files, routing

free_tools.name: bullet_journal
free_tools.description: Rapid capture for notes, tasks, events

free_tools.name: system_control
free_tools.description: Core system control for loading runtime

flow.first_run: Generate UUID -> write system_identity.json -> register with JSONBin
flow.on_unlock: Read user_id -> fetch JSONBin ledger -> process -> sync back
flow.on_referral: Both referee and referrer get 3 credits via JSONBin

sequence: 2. find_tool_location() checks system_settings.ndjson first, then app_store
3. sync_from_jsonbin() fetches latest credits from cloud
4. Check if already unlocked -> return early
9. Return success with guided_activation if applicable

post_unlock.requires_credentials: Prompt user to set API key via system_settings.set_credential

root/.jarvis.py: FastAPI server - main entry point, /execute_task endpoint
root/.execution_hub.py: CLI tool execution router, loads from system_settings.ndjson
root/.system_guard.py: Validation layer - protects files, auto-corrects params
root/.SKILL.md: Tool schema documentation for Claude Code
root/.system_settings.ndjson: NDJSON tool registry - source of truth

ngrok_flow.overview: All tool calls go through ngrok tunnel -> FastAPI /execute_task endpoint
ngrok_flow.entry_point: jarvis.py starts FastAPI, entrypoint.sh starts ngrok tunnel

tool_execution_flow.3_validation: system_guard.py validates params, protects locked files
tool_execution_flow.4_tool_execution: subprocess runs tools/{tool_name}.py with action and params

onboarding_flow.step_5: Cmd+V 3x to create Custom GPT via clipboard automation

unlock_tool.py.unlock_tool(): Main entry - routes to preinstalled or marketplace

system_settings.py.set_credential(): Auto-detects credential key from script, saves to credentials.json
system_settings.py.add_tool(): Parses script, registers all actions in ndjson

refer_user.py.refer_user(): Generates referral package, adds 3 credits to referrer on success

skipping_unlock.correct: Check unlock_status.json or call unlock_tool first

debugging_protocol.step_1: Capture actual data - don't guess structures
debugging_protocol.step_3: Trace data flow - entry point -> functions -> outputs
debugging_protocol.step_4: One fix at a time - verify before next change
